title: Session closeout: Thermal Swooping Wing — PDR curation complete, owner commit pending
body: Thermal Swooping Wing final closeout. Owner-approved principle routes graduated to PDR-083 and PDR-084. Session-handoff and consolidate-docs continuity updates written. Validation green: markdownlint, git diff --check, practice:fitness --strict-hard, and full pnpm check. No Thermal active claim to close. Owner will commit the staged/dirty closeout bundle.
